entry.message: [info] Activation of plug-in DQC Rules Validator successful, version Check version using Tools->DQC->Version on the GUI or --dqc-version on the command line. - validate/DQC

[xule.buildIndexTime] Index build time 0:00:00.084049. - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml
[xule.ruleDebug] Processing: DQC.US.0051.7484 - 16:33:39.903210 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml

[xule.ruleDebug] D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml

[DQC.US.0051.7484] IncomeTaxExpenseBenefit should not be included in the calculation of IncomeLossIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest in the group http://canyongoldexploration.com/20230430/role/idr_StatementCondensedConsolidatedStatementOfOperations. IncomeLossIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest is before the deduction of tax. Excluding the tax expense from the amount is inconsistent with the meaning of the element because this element represents a before tax item and should not be used to represent an after tax item. If IncomeLossIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest represents the amount after tax then use NetIncomeLoss instead.
Element Checked : IncomeLossIncludingPortionAttributableToNoncontrollingInterest
Rule Element Id:7484 Rule version: 29.0.2 - DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml 850
[xule.ruleEvalTime] DQC.US.0051.7484 time took: 3.64503 - 16:33:43.548487 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml
[xule.ruleEvalTime] Total number of rules processed: 1 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml
[xule.ruleEvalTime] Number of rules over 0.005s: 1 - D:\DJT\Documents\GitHub\davidtauriello\dqc_us_rules\tests\input\testfiles\2023-roll-2025\DTII_instance_2023_2025.xml
